name: Combo Builder contract and data foundation
description: Freeze the category-based combo contract, migrate shared DTOs and API services, and provide one canonical cached category/product reference source.

tasks.description: Produce an authoritative decision register covering new-group id nullability, categoryId/productIds, selectedProductIds separation, suggested-price method/path, wizard category chooser semantics, top-level required behavior, question types and clarifications mapping, includeSelections response/filter/image fields, WebSocket payload completeness, shared cache ownership versus existing caches, active-toggle strategy, canonical waiter route, dock editing, legacy admin orders, local draft scope, and accessibility expectations; assign unresolved items to backend or product owner.
Replace combo group name/optionIds DTOs with categoryId/productIds, change suggested-price breakdown to productId, add selectedProductIds to order DTOs, and normalize SelectionType typing.
Align SpecialSelections, Product, and Category HTTP services with confirmed endpoints, request methods, response shapes, and friendly typed errors.

Decide whether the combo reference cache replaces or supplements CategoriesCacheService and ProductCacheService.referenceData; implement the chosen root-scoped five-minute cache with category/product lookups, includeSelections loading, SPECIAL_SELECTION filtering, invalidation/refresh APIs, and migrated admin/waiter consumers without duplicate reference sources.
Add foundation tests for DTO payload shapes, API URLs and methods, cache TTL/filtering/name resolution, stale data, empty categories, and unavailable products.
Verify the CB-01-01 decision register exists and every resolved decision is applied, then review foundation implementation for contract correctness, cache reuse, error handling, and regression risk.

name: Combo Builder real-time cache synchronization
description: Make special-selection updates consistently refresh admin, waiter, detail, and reference data without duplicate subscriptions.

tasks.description: Define reliable application-level WebSocket connection ownership for direct admin and waiter combo routes.
Handle CREATE, UPDATE, SCHEDULE_CHANGE, PRICE_CHANGE, DELETE, and REVERT events by updating or invalidating combo list, available-now, detail, history, and reference caches.
Remove duplicate component-level refresh subscriptions, prevent duplicate refresh requests, expose a modified-combo signal, and connect it to waiter picker stale-state messaging in CB-05-01.
Test topic handling, deletion, reconnect behavior, cache invalidation, and duplicate-request prevention.
Review real-time lifecycle, subscription cleanup, race conditions, and stale-screen behavior.

name: Admin guided Combo Builder wizard
description: Build the responsive four-stage PrimeNG Timeline creation and editing flow with dynamic category group steps.

tasks.description: Create centralized signal-based wizard state, create/edit hydration, local-storage draft versioning, restore/discard flow, and cleanup after successful save.
Build PrimeNG vertical Timeline shell with general, dynamic per-category group, optional questions, and pricing stages plus active/completed/inactive markers and guarded navigation.

Implement general information fields for name, description, a UI-only category multi-select that generates one group per chosen category, schedule, and the confirmed Step 1 required/optional control semantics without inventing an unapproved API field.
Create reusable lazy-image product card showing thumbnail, name, and base price with selectable, disabled, keyboard, and unavailable states.
Build dynamic per-category group step routing with guarded back/forward navigation and state preservation.
Implement two-sided multi-product selection and drag/drop using the confirmed PrimeNG or Angular CDK pattern with correct transfer behavior.
Add category-filtered product search with debouncing, multi-select gestures, and clear available/selected states.
Add keyboard assignment controls and responsive vertical fallback so product selection never depends on pointer drag/drop.
Implement reusable group validation for category membership, required minimum, min/max ordering, selected count bounds, empty eligible-product categories, and progression blocking.
Implement optional combo questions stage with add/remove/edit, confirmed question types, skip behavior, and correct request mapping.
Implement pricing calculations and API state for selected-product costs, total cost, margin percentage, suggested-price request, final price, and use-suggested-price behavior.
Render productId-based pricing summary and breakdown with resolved product names, missing-recipe feedback, loading, retry, timeout, and manual-price states.
Wire create/update submission using categoryId/productIds, preserve additions/schedule/history behavior, renumber displayOrder, and map business/network/timeout errors to Spanish messages.
Add wizard state, hydration, validation, drag/drop fallback, pricing, persistence, payload, accessibility, and responsive component tests.
Review wizard UX, PrimeNG usage, WCAG keyboard flow, persistence safety, API mapping, and tablet/desktop layouts.

name: Admin traditional combo group editor
description: Retain a compact editing view for fast category, product, constraint, and order changes while sharing wizard state and validation.

tasks.description: Build group list rows with category dropdown, searchable category-filtered product multi-select, min/max inputs, required toggle, add/remove, and category-name headings.
Implement accessible group reorder and consistent displayOrder renumbering after add, remove, category change, and drag operations.
Share state, validation, product availability handling, save mapping, and local drafts with the guided wizard without duplicated business logic.
After CB-01-01 records the endpoint decision, update admin combo list labels, loading/error/empty states, real-time updates, suggested-price action, and active-toggle behavior.
Test quick editing, filtering, reorder, shared draft synchronization, stale products, and save payloads.
Review quick-editor consistency with wizard and guard against divergent validation or payload behavior.

name: Waiter category-based combo picker
description: Render category groups from cached references and collect valid product selections for orders.

tasks.description: Fix combo detail routing/navigation and load combo, categories, and includeSelections products with skeleton, empty, retry, timeout, stale-data states, and consumption of the CB-02-03 modified-combo signal.
Render category names and product cards with names/base prices, radio controls for maxSelections=1, checkboxes for multi-select, counters, and responsive accessible layouts.
Enforce required, minimum, maximum, category membership, unavailable-product, and modified-combo rules; disable Add to Order until valid.
Preserve additions and clarifications while flattening selected combo group values into selectedProductIds and keeping selectedOptionIds standard-only.
Add waiter picker tests for name resolution, single/multi selection, bounds, counters, missing products, WebSocket modification, routing, and dock handoff.
Review waiter flow for validation gaps, touch/keyboard usability, race conditions, and payload separation.

name: Order dock and submission migration
description: Carry selectedProductIds separately through dock state, editing, merging, quantity expansion, and POST v1/orders.

tasks.description: Add selectedProductIds to DockItem and every order-detail construction path while retaining selectedOptionIds for standard options only.
Update dock merge identity to include selected products, selected options, additions, clarifications, and instructions so distinct combo configurations never merge.
Implement confirmed combo edit behavior in the dock and preserve all combo state across edits, diners, quantity changes, and table selection.
Update POST v1/orders serialization and decide whether the legacy admin order-creation route must support selectedProductIds or be explicitly excluded.
Test dock identity, quantity expansion, edit preservation, diner handling, exact order payloads, and 400/404/409/network errors.
Review end-to-end order state integrity and verify combo product IDs never leak into selectedOptionIds.

name: Combo Builder downstream verification and release hardening
description: Verify order rendering, accessibility, performance, documentation, and full regression coverage before release.

tasks.description: Verify and update kitchen, admin order details, and waiter today-orders rendering for resolved category groups, selected products, additions, and clarifications.
Audit lazy image loading, debounced filtering, shared cache use, draft size/versioning, responsive tablet/desktop behavior, contrast, ARIA labels, focus order, and keyboard operation.
Add integration coverage for admin create/edit, waiter selection, order submission, suggested price, and WebSocket refresh; remove stale name/optionIds combo assumptions.
Update requested usage and API migration documentation, including category/product cache behavior, order field separation, drafts, and real-time updates.
Run the documented verification matrix and mandatory harness; fix lint, build, test, style, accessibility, and regression failures.
Perform final implementation review against every user requirement and release checkpoint before marking the feature done.
